title: Integrate checkpoint C OSCORE fixes
description: Recover recipient-ID bounds, empty-ID rejection, persistence copy ordering, context wipe, PIV validation, response PIV selection, and restored-SSN warnings.
acceptance_criteria: RFC vectors pass; response nonce uses correct PIV; invalid IDs do not mutate state; contexts wipe in callers; native Linux Zephyr matrix and three reviews pass.
notes: Rust .48.2 review also identified C parity work for this bead: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c ordinary responses are repeatable with same request nonce; fresh-PIV responses do not reserve/update notification replay state; request KID is parsed but not bound to recipient ID; coap_client.c discards response OSCORE option and always passes empty, blocking fresh-PIV notifications. Add these to C OSCORE acceptance and Linux .59.1 matrix; no AWS source work attempted.
close_reason: Rust IPv6+Meshtastic transplant from checkpoint complete per task; cargo test -p lichen-ipv6 -p lichen-meshtastic and clippy clean; conventional commit made; deprecation warnings resolved; supports .59 recovery
